author.bio: #IPFS Core Dev. Peer-2-Peer Engineer and Researcher @protocollabs: @mineFilecoin @libp2p @ipld | P2P http://M.Sc. Lecturer at @istecnico. Made @lxjs & @startupscholars
author.name: David Dias

content.text:
I'm thrilled to share with you the launch of **A New Lab for Resilient Networks Research**, created at @protocollabs Research. 

Get to know about its focus & contributions at
https://research.protocol.ai/posts/201912-resnetlab-launch
#IPFS #libp2p

2020 is set to be just phenomenal! 🥂
